name: WeatherAPI
what_it_does: Weather data API providing current conditions, forecasts up to 14 days, historical data, astronomy, time zone, and sports weather via a clean REST interface.
use_cases: Getting weather forecasts for trip planning agents
Retrieving hyperlocal weather with air quality and UV index
Historical weather lookups for analytics and ML training data
Astronomy data (sunrise/sunset, moon phases) for scheduling agents
Weather alerts and severe weather monitoring
not_for: Scientific climate research requiring raw station data
best_when: You need a generous free tier, clean API design, and richer data than OpenWeatherMap (air quality, sports, astronomy in one API).
avoid_when: You need official government weather data sources or aviation-grade precision.

auth.notes: Simple API key as query parameter. No scopes or complex auth required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 million calls/month, 3-day forecast, current weather
pricing.notes: Very generous free tier (1M calls/month). Paid tiers unlock longer forecast windows, history, and higher rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: Free: no stated per-minute limit within monthly quota

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors include error.code and error.message. Codes are documented. Cleaner than OpenWeatherMap errors.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API - all calls are naturally idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Historical data only available back 1 year on free/entry plans; more history requires higher tiers
Location parameter accepts city name, lat/lon, US zip, UK postcode, IP - flexible but must validate format
14-day forecast requires paid plan - free tier limited to 3 days
Air quality and astronomy endpoints are separate and count toward monthly quota
Response includes both metric and imperial units - agents must specify or parse both
